headlines.headline: Ulvon Renewables expands operations into Asia Pacific markets

sentiment.reasoning: A CSO addressing investor concerns in an open letter indicates an attempt to manage negative sentiment, but the effectiveness depends on the content of the letter.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
